title: Steamed Bao Buns with Scallion Butter
description: A Chinese-inspired dish featuring steamed buns filled with a rich scallion butter and served with a side of pan-fried potatoes. This recipe is perfect for a light and savory meal.
instructions: Heat 1 tablespoon of buttery in a pan over medium heat.
Add the cubed potatoes and cook until golden brown, about 10 minutes.
Meanwhile, steam the buns according to package instructions.
In a separate pan, melt the remaining buttery over low heat.
Add minced scallions to the melted butter and stir to combine.
Split the steamed buns in half and fill with the scallion butter.
Serve with the pan-fried potatoes on the side.
